name: Non-resident middle income (no IETC)
description: Non-resident earning NZD 60,000 in NZ - same PAYE rates but no IETC eligibility

sources.description: Calculated using 2026-27 PAYE rates and ACC levy for non-resident worker
sources.notes: PAYE: Same rates as residents. ACC: 1.75%. IETC: Not available for non-residents. A resident earning $60,000 would get $520 IETC, saving ~$520/year.
